title: Mean-field gap equation for tetrad condensation in the ADW mechanism
summary: All numerical claims reproduce within tolerance. All Lean theorems verified (21 theorems, 0 sorry, lake build clean). G_c = 8pi^2/(N_f Lambda^2) confirmed correct (8pi^2, not 4pi^2). Vestigial MC paragraph correctly references Weingarten framework. Six minor findings: one phantom Lean theorem name, one stale PAPER_DEPENDENCIES entry, three orphan citations missing from CITATION_REGISTRY, two orphan bibliography entries, and one citation key mismatch.

claims.notes: Exact symbolic match. Confirmed 8pi^2 (not 4pi^2) per 9B audit.
Formula matches exactly between paper and formulas.py. CW potential verified via tests.

claims.claim: Curvature d^2V/dC^2|_{C=0} changes sign at G_c
claims.notes: Verified: positive for G < G_c, ~0 at G = G_c, negative for G > G_c. 78/78 ADW tests pass.

claims.claim: Nontrivial minimum with V_eff(C_min) < 0 for G > G_c
Flat-spacetime tetrad e^a_mu = C delta^a_mu gives Lorentzian signature (-,+,+,+)
N_f = 4 four-component Dirac fermions from 3D cubic lattice (2^3 = 8 Weyl species)
claims.notes: 2^3 = 8 Weyl -> 4 Dirac. Lean theorem weyl_species_3d and dirac_species_3d confirm.
Lean theorem structural_obstacle_count confirms. Names match: spin_connection_gap, grassmann_bosonic, nielsen_ninomiya, cosmological_constant.

claims.claim: Second-order phase transition at G = G_c
claims.notes: Consistent with Coleman-Weinberg mechanism at mean-field level.

layer_2_theorem_references.lean_build: CLEAN (zero sorry, 8065 jobs, warnings only for unused variables in other files)

theorems_referenced_in_paper.notes: FINDING: No single theorem named 'phase_classification' in Lean. The phase classification is proved by three separate theorems: pos_C_gives_full_tetrad, zero_C_no_fluct_gives_pregeometric, zero_C_with_fluct_gives_vestigial. Paper should reference these or use a collective name that matches.

findings.finding: Paper references 'phase_classification' as a Lean theorem name but no such single theorem exists. The result is split across three theorems: pos_C_gives_full_tetrad, zero_C_no_fluct_gives_pregeometric, zero_C_with_fluct_gives_vestigial.
findings.recommendation: Either rename to reference the three individual theorems, or add a collective theorem 'phase_classification' in Lean that combines them.

layer_3_parameter_provenance.notes: Paper 5 does not use any experimentally-measured parameters (no BEC platform parameters). All quantities are theoretical/structural: G_c formula, mode counting, symmetry dimensions. No PARAMETER_PROVENANCE entries needed beyond what exists.

Wetterich2005.notes: Paper bibitem key is 'Wetterich2005' but registry key is 'Wetterich2004'. Reference data (PRD 70, 105004, year 2004) is correct in both places. Year in registry (2004) matches published year.

Wen2006.notes: Paper bibitem key 'Wen2006' vs registry key 'LevinWen2006'. Bibliographic data matches.

Roy2016.notes: NOT IN CITATION_REGISTRY. Paper bibliography: Roy, Juricic, Herbut, JHEP 04, 018 (2016). Used for Herbut velocity equalization mechanism.

Vladimirov2012.notes: Paper bibitem key 'Vladimirov2012' vs registry key 'VladimirovDiakonov2012'. Registry used_in does NOT include paper5 but should.

Maitiniyazi2024.notes: NOT IN CITATION_REGISTRY. Paper bibliography: Maitiniyazi et al., PRD 109, 106018 (2024). ALSO: orphan bibitem -- not cited in paper text.

Selch2025.notes: NOT IN CITATION_REGISTRY. Paper bibliography: Selch and Zubkov, Symmetry 17, 1045 (2025). ALSO: orphan bibitem -- not cited in paper text.

findings.finding: Three citations in paper bibliography are missing from CITATION_REGISTRY: Roy2016, Maitiniyazi2024, Selch2025.
findings.recommendation: Add these to CITATION_REGISTRY with used_in including paper5.

findings.finding: Maitiniyazi2024 and Selch2025 are orphan bibliography entries -- they appear in \thebibliography but are never \cite{}'d in the paper text.
findings.recommendation: Either cite them in the appropriate context or remove from bibliography.

findings.finding: VladimirovDiakonov2012 registry used_in list does not include paper5, but paper5 cites it.
Citation key mismatches between paper bibitem keys and registry keys: Wetterich2005 vs Wetterich2004, Wen2006 vs LevinWen2006, Vladimirov2012 vs VladimirovDiakonov2012.
findings.recommendation: Normalize keys or document the mapping. Bibliographic data is correct in all cases.

claims.claim: Gravitons are Higgs bosons of the tetrad order parameter, NOT Nambu-Goldstone bosons
claims.pipeline_source: fluctuations.py::graviton_identification returns nature='Higgs boson of tetrad order parameter'
claims.notes: Correct: NG modes are absorbed by spin connection; gravitons are in the residual Higgs sector.

claims.claim: Three gravitational phases: pre-geometric, vestigial metric, full tetrad
claims.pipeline_source: gap_equation.py::PhaseType enum, classify_phase function; Lean: GravPhase inductive type with three constructors

claims.claim: Vestigial MC paragraph references Weingarten framework (not stale split transition claims)
claims.notes: Paper correctly states 'SO(4) Weingarten multi-channel bond coupling (fundamental + adjoint representation channels)'. Matches pipeline.

claims.claim: None of the four obstacles is definitively fatal
claims.pipeline_source: fluctuations.py::structural_obstacles -- all have status='open', severities are 'serious' or 'moderate' (none 'fatal')

claims.notes: Appropriate: mechanism works at mean-field with fundamental fermions; obstacles identified for emergent extension.

findings.finding: PAPER_DEPENDENCIES in provenance.py (line 707) contains stale key_claim: 'd^2-1 = 15 broken generators in 4D'. The actual number of broken generators is d(d-1)/2 = 6 (in 4D), not d^2-1 = 15. The paper and code are correct; only this registry entry is wrong.
findings.recommendation: Fix PAPER_DEPENDENCIES key_claims entry to: 'd(d-1)/2 = 6 broken generators in 4D'.

findings_summary.description: Paper references Lean theorem 'phase_classification' which does not exist as a single theorem. Split across three separate theorems.
findings_summary.recommendation: Update paper to reference the three individual theorem names, or add a collective theorem.

findings_summary.description: PAPER_DEPENDENCIES key_claim 'd^2-1 = 15 broken generators in 4D' is incorrect. Should be 'd(d-1)/2 = 6 broken generators in 4D'.
Three paper citations missing from CITATION_REGISTRY: Roy2016, Maitiniyazi2024, Selch2025.
Two orphan bibliography entries (Maitiniyazi2024, Selch2025) never cited in paper text.
findings_summary.recommendation: Either cite them or remove from bibliography.

findings_summary.description: VladimirovDiakonov2012 registry used_in does not include paper5.
findings_summary.recommendation: Add paper5 path to used_in list.

findings_summary.description: Bibitem key mismatches: Wetterich2005 (paper) vs Wetterich2004 (registry), Wen2006 vs LevinWen2006, Vladimirov2012 vs VladimirovDiakonov2012. Data is correct in all cases.
